name: Sample Collector
description: Staff responsible for sample collection and initial registration

name: Laboratory Technician
description: Technical staff performing lab processing and analysis

name: Junior Senior Researcher
description: Research staff conducting analysis and reporting

name: Lab Manager Supervisor
description: Management staff with full system access

name: Sample Registration
description: Grouping for sample registration privileges

name: Register Samples
description: Can create and register new sample records

name: Update Samples
description: Can update existing sample records

name: Sample Processing Analysis
description: Grouping for sample processing privileges

name: View Processing Workflows
description: Can view sample processing workflows (read-only)

name: Update Processing Workflows
description: Can update processing and assay metadata

name: Full Processing Access
description: Full access to all processing workflows

name: Record Editing
description: Grouping for record editing privileges

name: Edit Own Records
description: Can modify only own record entries

name: Edit Processing Data
description: Can edit processing data records

name: Edit All Records
description: Can edit any record in the system

name: Result Review Validation
description: Grouping for result validation privileges

name: Validate Results
description: Can validate test results

name: Review Results
description: Can review results without validation authority

name: Full Validation Access
description: Full access to result review and validation

name: Data Analysis Reporting
description: Grouping for reporting privileges

name: View Own Reports
description: Can view reports for own test runs only

name: Aggregate Analyze Data
description: Can aggregate and analyze data across runs

name: Full Reporting Access
description: Full access to all reporting features

name: Equipment Management
description: Grouping for equipment privileges

name: Manage Equipment
description: Can manage laboratory equipment

name: Quality Assurance EQA
description: Grouping for QA privileges

name: Manage QA
description: Can manage quality assurance and EQA activities
